headline: Jabil Rides on AI Infrastructure Focus: Reason to Bet on the Stock?
summary: JBL ramps AI server, liquid-cooling and silicon photonics production, backing it with a $500M U.S. expansion to meet data-center demand.

headline: CLS' Raised Outlook Oozes Confidence: Reason to Bet on the Stock?
summary: CLS boosts 2026 outlook to $19B revenue and $10.15 EPS as AI demand fuels its compute, networking and new data center products.
